L.label: lead
L.prompt: Keep the spine upright and the gaze straight toward the viewer. Make an inviting, presenting, or clearly indicating hand gesture part of the silhouette.

F.label: follow
F.prompt: Use a slight head tilt with an upward or lowered gaze. Keep the hands close to the chest, gently receiving, or partly behind the body.

G.label: give
G.prompt: Make the active hands the focal action: offer the specified prop or handle the specified tool with clear intent.

T.label: take
T.prompt: Make a receiving gesture the focal action: accept the specified object or draw it gently toward the chest.

R.label: romantic
R.prompt: Use warm accents, a restrained cheek blush, and tiny flower or heart echoes outside the top arch emblem.

P.label: playful
P.prompt: Shift the supporting palette cool, use a composed or quietly daring expression, and add only subtle night atmosphere or four-point sparkles outside the top arch emblem.

C.label: calm
C.prompt: Use a nearly bilateral, orderly silhouette, precisely fastened clothing, and a still balanced pose.

D.label: dynamic
D.prompt: Use clear asymmetry, moving hair or a lifted coat edge, one relaxed fastening or open outer layer, and a pose captured in motion.

LGRC.hair: deep chestnut hair gathered into a low ponytail, with a clean side part and a few soft face-framing strands
LGRC.attire: an elegant long coat with broad panels in muted burgundy #8f3f5a, black gloves, and one tiny bell charm at the fastening
LGRC.gestureExpression: extend one gloved hand toward the viewer while smiling softly; let the other hand present the tiny bell
LGRC.vignette: a warm study fireplace, one reading chair, and quiet shelves
LGRC.silhouette: upright and open, with one long diagonal created by the offered arm

LGRD.hair: glossy jet-black hair worn long and perfectly straight, falling well below the shoulders
LGRD.attire: a deep-wine mantle covering at least one large side of the figure, secured with a delicate jewelry-chain clasp and a small crown accent
LGRD.gestureExpression: meet the viewer with unwavering eye contact while winding the delicate jewelry chain once around two fingers as an ornamental gesture
LGRD.vignette: heavy wine-colored theater drapery with a narrow opening
LGRD.silhouette: tall, regal, and vertical, with the long hair and mantle forming two dark columns

LGPC.hair: precisely cut ash-white short hair with a neat contour and one understated side fringe
LGPC.attire: a meticulous artisan waistcoat and apron panels in cool slate #556b73, paired with crisp white gloves
LGPC.gestureExpression: look downward in concentration while carefully tying a decorative silk cord knot with both gloved hands
LGPC.emblem: one ornamental cord knot with rounded loops, never a star or geometric occult mark
LGPC.vignette: orderly workshop shelves holding blank boxes, spools, and simple tools
LGPC.silhouette: compact, centered, and precise, with both hands meeting at the middle

LGPD.hair: tousled silver-white hair emerging from a hood with a subtle wolf-ear silhouette
LGPD.attire: a sweeping night-indigo coat whose lining and broad lapels prominently use #4b4b78
LGPD.gestureExpression: turn back mid-step with a quietly daring half-smile, one hand controlling the flying coat edge and the other indicating the path ahead
LGPD.vignette: a tall night window with a pale moonlit sill and distant rooftops
LGPD.silhouette: strong backward twist, lifted coat hem, and clearly wind-swept hood and hair

LTRC.hair: chestnut medium-length hair in soft waves with an open forehead
LTRC.attire: a tailored warm-rose jacket whose large inner panels resemble stage-curtain lining, using #a04d67 across the lapels and lower half
LTRC.gestureExpression: lift one curtain-like coat edge and invite the viewer forward; hold a completely blank script booklet and a tiny bell in the other hand
LTRC.vignette: a quiet theater wing with curtain ropes and an unmarked stage entrance
LTRC.silhouette: a wide welcoming V shape made by the raised curtain edge and open stance

LTRD.hair: honey-blond hair arranged in long vertical ringlets with a polished crown-like volume
LTRD.attire: the most lavish warm-wine formal ensemble, with generous velvet panels in #7c3658, ornate cuffs, and antique-gold trim
LTRD.gestureExpression: sit on a petite antique ceremonial chair with cheek resting on one hand while the other hand extends openly toward the viewer
LTRD.vignette: a softly glowing chandelier above an elegant salon floor
LTRD.silhouette: a low seated triangle, one elbow raised and one open hand projecting forward

LTPC.hair: a precise ash-violet bob with two clean geometric hairpins that are not symbols
LTPC.attire: a structured director coat with large cool-violet panels in #6d557b and a compact antique speaking trumpet at the belt
LTPC.gestureExpression: form a rectangular viewing frame with the fingers to measure the composition, keeping the speaking trumpet secondary and pointed downward
LTPC.emblem: one pair of parted theater curtains
LTPC.vignette: two soft stage lamps and a blank rehearsal wall with no signs or writing
LTPC.silhouette: square shoulders and a distinctive hand-made frame held in front of one eye

LTPD.hair: wine-red hair swept backward in a smooth wave, exposing the forehead and one ear
LTPD.attire: a lively asymmetrical tailcoat with broad lining and waistcoat areas in #9a4f73
LTPD.gestureExpression: raise a slender conductor baton high in one hand, caught mid-sweep with a relaxed confident smile and the free hand receiving the imagined rhythm
LTPD.emblem: one crossed pair of slender conductor batons
LTPD.vignette: one elegant music stand holding completely blank cream paper, with no notes, staffs, letters, or numerals
LTPD.silhouette: a strong airborne diagonal from baton tip to the opposite lifted coat tail

FGRC.hair: neatly groomed short black hair with a precise side part and a smooth compact outline
FGRC.attire: a refined service uniform with a broad teal-gray waistcoat and long coat panels in #4f6a70, plus a soft ribbon neck detail
FGRC.gestureExpression: make a shallow courteous bow while offering a silver tray carrying one small ribboned box; wear a gentle devoted smile
FGRC.emblem: one simple polished silver serving tray
FGRC.vignette: an orderly serving room with folded linens and blank cupboard doors
FGRC.silhouette: a forward bow with both hands and the bright oval tray clearly projecting toward the viewer

FGRD.hair: dusty rose hair in two playful ponytails, clearly adult-styled and asymmetrically loosened
FGRD.attire: a berry-rose short mantle and long waistcoat with at least one broad panel in #b34e70, tiny horn-shaped hair ornaments, a decorative pointed tail, and one loosened ribbon
FGRD.gestureExpression: wink while hiding a harmless sweet behind the back with both hands partly concealed, weight tipped onto one foot
FGRD.emblem: one symmetric pair of small curved horn silhouettes
FGRD.vignette: a slightly scattered confectionery table with wrapped sweets and no labels
FGRD.silhouette: two high hair shapes, hidden hands, tilted shoulders, and a curling decorative tail

FGPC.hair: meticulously combed steel-gray short hair with a straight side part and no loose strands
FGPC.attire: an immaculate steward suit whose waistcoat and long coat panels use #66707f across at least one quarter of the figure
FGPC.gestureExpression: quietly check an antique pocket watch with a completely blank face, holding it close to the chest with measured stillness
FGPC.emblem: one simple pocket-watch silhouette with blank face and no tick marks
FGPC.vignette: a long quiet corridor with repeating doors and no plaques or signs
FGPC.silhouette: strict vertical symmetry with one small circular watch held at the center

FGPD.hair: the approved design: a glossy black bob sweeping across and hiding one eye
FGPD.attire: the approved design: a charcoal-black long coat with broad #333747 panels, antique-gold buttons, and a refined ribbon choker carrying a small cat clasp
FGPD.gestureExpression: preserve the approved half-sideways gaze and small self-possessed smile; one hand touches the cat choker while the other lifts the coat edge
FGPD.emblem: one crescent moon paired with one minimal black-cat head silhouette
FGPD.vignette: the approved moonlit library window with one subtle black-cat shadow
FGPD.silhouette: preserve the approved large black bob, crossed tiptoe stance, and rounded flowing coat

FTRC.hair: warm-brown tousled hair beneath a soft hood with long floppy-ear shapes
FTRC.attire: a soft layered knit ensemble with broad warm-clay panels in #8c5a54 and a ribbon necklace carrying one tiny ceramic bone charm
FTRC.gestureExpression: lean forward slightly with eyes bright in expectation, drawing the offered charm close to the chest
FTRC.emblem: one small ceramic bone paired with one simple ribbon loop
FTRC.vignette: a gentle patch of window sunlight with a cushion and one houseplant
FTRC.silhouette: forward-leaning rounded knit shapes framed by two long floppy hood ears

FTRD.hair: long pale-gold hair in soft romantic curls, flowing asymmetrically over both shoulders
FTRD.attire: the sweetest and pinkest outfit in the set: a fully clothed frilled ceremonial long coat with large rose-pink panels in #c16184, a delicate tiara, heart-shaped fastenings, and soft ivory ruffles
FTRD.gestureExpression: receive one rose with both hands near the heart, cheeks visibly blushing, gaze lifted shyly upward with delighted warmth
FTRD.vignette: a luminous rose window and a few soft rose petals, with no lettering
FTRD.silhouette: a flowing bell shape of long curls and frilled pink panels gathered around the received rose

FTPC.hair: blue-silver hair worn long, straight, and perfectly smooth, falling as two cool vertical curtains
FTPC.attire: a high-necked quiet robe with broad blue-gray panels in #596072 and one antique key pendant
FTPC.gestureExpression: stand completely still with eyes lowered, hands overlapped gently at the sternum around the key pendant
FTPC.emblem: one antique key aligned with one simple keyhole silhouette
FTPC.vignette: a hushed archive with tall shadowed shelves and a narrow pool of cool window light
FTPC.silhouette: long bilateral hair and robe columns enclosing two layered hands at the exact center

FTPD.hair: wild layered hair shifting from smoky violet to dusk lavender at the tips
FTPD.attire: a free-moving long coat and broad star sash using #745487 over at least one quarter of the figure, with a satin ribbon looped only around the fingers and never across the face
FTPD.gestureExpression: turn lightly on tiptoe as if beginning a spin, playing with the satin ribbon in one hand and receiving a tiny four-point sparkle in the other
FTPD.vignette: a tall twilight window scattered with tiny four-point sparkles and no constellations or signs
FTPD.silhouette: spiraling hair tips, floating sash, fingertip ribbon, and a single tiptoe pivot
